rules.rule_text:
rule rtf_multiple
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		maltype = "Multiple"
		version = "0.1"
		reference = "fd69a799e21ccb308531ce6056944842"
		date = "01/04/2014"

	strings:
		$rtf = { 7b 5c 72 74 ?? ?? }
		$string1 = "author user"
		$string2 = "title Vjkygdjdtyuj" nocase
		$string3 = "company ooo"
		$string4 = "password 00000000"

	condition:
		($rtf at 0 ) and ( all of ( $string* ) )
}
